transformationMoves: Replace reportorial or system-summary lines with prison-bound infrastructure and material contact.
Swap invisible cognition summaries for chain, breath, gaze, cot, threshold, and stone beats.
Keep dialogue grounded through echo, taps, scrape, and pulse timing instead of explanatory labels.
Let recognition travel through remembered surfaces and repeated phrasing, not briefing syntax.
Protect the chapter's clipped cadence while making each threat beat more tactile.

scenes.title: Through the Wall
scenes.biggestGap: A few lines still summarize partnership logic or Sylvanas's readiness from above instead of letting the wall, chain, and blade pulse carry it.

sceneContract.placeAnchor: Adjacent palace cells below the evidence vault, with every exchange forced through masonry instead of open air.
sceneContract.materialAnchor: Flagstones, mortar seam, wrist irons, cot frame, torch brackets, and prison damp keep the blade read physical.
sceneContract.povAnchor: Jaina reads Frostmourne as hostile magical structure and forces that read into road-useful language.
sceneContract.dialogueAnchor: Long wall-runs need chain scrape, palm-to-stone contact, breath, echo, or pulse timing nearby.
sceneContract.exitAnchor: The scene must leave the blade's countdown in the palace stone, not in abstraction.

scenes.title: The Visitor
scenes.biggestGap: The threat-read and closing handoff still want to drift into inferred motive and briefing language instead of staying locked to what Sylvanas can physically track and pass outward.

sceneContract.placeAnchor: A human cell under the vault, with the barred door and corridor threshold always legible.
sceneContract.materialAnchor: Threshold light, bars, pitch, flagstones, ankle chain, cot frame, and remembered road textures carry the reveal.
sceneContract.povAnchor: Sylvanas reads the visitor as a battlefield problem first: weight, reach, exits, gaze, disguises, and habit.
sceneContract.dialogueAnchor: Every long exchange needs a bodily or environmental pressure beat close by.
sceneContract.exitAnchor: The farewell clue must relight remembered surfaces and compress into prison-usable intelligence.
